ques: Check the Horse Racing results in Sport section, browse all the games that took place yesterday and see which one had the highest number of runners.
answer: Newcastle had the race(s) with the highest number of runners yesterday (Thu 25 June 2026) — 13 runners, in both the 14:02 "JenningsBet In North Shields Handicap" and the 18:07 "Fly From Newcastle Airport Handicap".
